WAYFINDING PROOF / TIDE

SHAPE TIDE.

Grab a knot to reshape the continuous rope wordmark. Choose a decoded material swatch, then lock the proof.

LEGIBILITY— LOAD— DECISIONANALYSING
Decoding the committed rope material scan…

Drag any visible knot with mouse, touch, or pen. Use Tab to focus the editor, arrow keys to nudge the selected knot, T to change tension, Enter to lock the proof, and Escape or R to reset.

SVG Path API · material-aware rope decoded source fibers → direct knot manipulation → lockable rope-sign proof
